lines.english: Today I was very busy and tired.
I got up at seven-thirty in the morning. After taking a shower, I had breakfast.
While I was eating, I listened to the sound recording.
At nine o'clock, I went to the classroom for class.
The first class was Chinese. The teacher taught us pronunciation, new words, and grammar. She also taught us how to write characters and gave us a new text. This text was very interesting.
The second class was computer class. It was very difficult.
At noon, I went to the cafeteria with my classmates for lunch.
While we were eating, we practiced speaking Chinese.
In the afternoon, I went to the library to go online.
At four o'clock, Wang Peng came to find me to play ball.
At a quarter to six, I had dinner.
At seven-thirty, I went to Bai Ying'ai's dorm to chat with her.
When I got there, she was doing her homework.
Before I went to sleep, Gao Wenzhong gave me a call. He told me there would be an exam tomorrow. I said I already knew.

example_sentence.py: Nà piān kèwén hěn yǒu yìsi.

example_sentence.cn: 他今天早上起床以后就听中文录音了。
example_sentence.py: Tā jīntiān zǎoshang qǐ chuáng yǐhòu jiù tīng Zhōngwén lùyīn le.
example_sentence.en: He listened to the Chinese audio right after he got up this morning.

example_sentence.py: Wǒ yībiān xī zǎo, yìbiān chàng gē.
example_sentence.en: I sang while I was showering.

vocabulary.definition: simultaneously, at the same time [See Grammar 3.]

example_sentence.cn: 我们一边吃晚饭，一边练习说中文。
example_sentence.py: Wǒmen yìbiān chī wǎnfàn, yìbiān liànxí shuō Zhōngwén.
example_sentence.en: We practiced speaking Chinese while having dinner.

example_sentence.cn: 我昨天到他宿舍的时候，他正在练习发音。
example_sentence.py: Wǒ zuótiān dào tā sùshè de shíhou, tā zhèngzài liànxí fāyīn.
example_sentence.en: When I got to his dorm yesterday, he was in the middle of practicing pronunciation.

example_sentence.cn: 昨天第一节课是中文。老师教我们发音、生词和语法,也教我们写字,还给了我们一篇新课文。那篇课文很有意思。
example_sentence.py: Zuótiān dì yī jié kè shì Zhōngwén. Lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen fāyīn, shēngcí hé yǔfǎ, yě jiāo wǒmen xiě zì, hái gěi le wǒmen yì piān xīn kèwén. Nà piān kèwén hěn yǒu yìsi.
example_sentence.en: Yesterday, the first class was Chinese. Our teacher taught us pronunciation, vocabulary, and grammar. She also taught us how to write characters and gave us a new text. That text was very interesting.

vocabulary.definition: to go online, to surf the internet

example_sentence.cn: 我昨天到他宿舍的时候,他正在练习发音。
example_sentence.py: Wǒ zuótiān dào tā sùshè de shíhou, tā zhèngzài liànxí fāyīn.
example_sentence.en: When I got to his dorm yesterday, he was in the middle of practicing pronunciation.

vocabulary.definition: in the middle of (doing something) [See Grammar 7.]

example_sentence.cn: 我们现在正在上课,你别打电话。
example_sentence.py: Wǒmen xiànzài zhèngzài shàng kè, nǐ bié dǎ diànhuà.
example_sentence.en: We are in class right now. Don't make phone calls.

example_sentence.cn: 你知道不知道王老师在哪儿?
example_sentence.py: Nǐ zhīdao bù zhīdào Wáng lǎoshī zài nǎr?
example_sentence.en: Do you know where Teacher Wang is?

video_global_config.visual_style: Vibrant 3D Pixar animation style, warm and inviting lighting, detailed textures, expressive characters, cinematic feel with a shallow depth of field.

character_definitions.name: 李友 (Lǐ Yǒu)
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A 19-year-old Chinese female college student named Li You. She has shoulder-length black hair, often tied in a loose ponytail, with friendly, expressive brown eyes and stylish, thin-rimmed glasses. She wears comfortable and modern casual outfits, such as a yellow hoodie and blue jeans.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 开场，日记本特写，翻开后展现李友忙碌但充实的一天。清晨，李友一边吃早餐，一边戴着耳机听中文录音，展现她勤奋学习的日常。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: A close-up shot of a diary opening to a page dated '十一月三日'. The scene transitions to Li You sitting at her sunlit kitchen table. She is eating toast and milk while wearing modern wireless headphones connected to her phone. Animated sound waves emanate from the headphones to visualize the audio. The camera slowly pushes in on her focused, determined expression. 3D Pixar style, warm morning light streaming through the window, creating a soft glow.

voice_over.content: 今天我很忙,很累。早上七点半起床,洗了澡以后就吃早饭。我一边吃饭,一边听录音。
voice_over.pinyin: Jīntiān wǒ hěn máng, hěn lèi. Zǎoshang qī diǎn bàn qǐchuáng, xǐ le zǎo yǐhòu jiù chī zǎofàn. Wǒ yībiān chīfàn, yībiān tīng lùyīn.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 在明亮现代的中文教室里，老师正在智能白板上生动地讲解汉字“发音”，李友和其他同学在下面认真地听讲和做笔记。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: A vibrant and modern classroom. A friendly female teacher points to beautifully written Chinese characters for '发音' and '语法' on a large interactive smartboard. The camera pans from the teacher to Li You in the foreground, who is diligently writing characters in her notebook, a look of concentration on her face. 3D Pixar style, bright and clean classroom lighting, with sunlight filtering through large windows.

voice_over.content: 第一节课是中文, 老师教我们发音、生词和语法, 也教我们写字。
voice_over.pinyin: Dì yī jié kè shì Zhōngwén, lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen fāyīn, shēngcí hé yǔfǎ, yě jiāo wǒmen xiězì.

screen_overlay.main_text: 教室 (jiàoshì) / 发音 (fāyīn) / 语法 (yǔfǎ) / 写字 (xiězì)
screen_overlay.sub_text: classroom / pronunciation / grammar / to write characters

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 中午，李友和几个不同国籍的同学在热闹的学校餐厅里，一边吃饭一边开心地用中文交谈，练习口语。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: A bustling but clean university cafeteria at lunchtime. Li You and two other diverse students are sitting at a table, eating and laughing. Playful speech bubbles with simple Chinese characters (你好, 谢谢) pop up as they talk, visualizing their conversation. The camera is at eye-level, capturing their friendly and engaged interaction. 3D Pixar style, natural indoor lighting from large windows.

voice_over.content: 中午我和同学们一起到餐厅去吃午饭。我们一边吃, 一边练习说中文。
voice_over.pinyin: Zhōngwǔ wǒ hé tóngxuémen yìqǐ dào cāntīng qù chī wǔfàn. Wǒmen yībiān chī, yībiān liànxí shuō Zhōngwén.

screen_overlay.main_text: 餐厅 (cāntīng) / 午饭 (wǔfàn) / 练习 (liànxí)

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 下午，李友来到宏伟的图书馆，坐在电脑前上网查资料。之后，她又和朋友王朋在户外的篮球场上活力地打球。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: A dynamic split-screen shot. On the left, Li You sits at a computer in a grand, quiet library with high ceilings, focused on the screen. On the right, she is on a sunny outdoor basketball court, laughing as she passes a basketball to a male friend. The transition between the two scenes is a smooth wipe. 3D Pixar style, with calm, focused lighting on the left and bright, golden hour sunlight on the right.

voice_over.content: 下午我到图书馆去上网。四点王朋来找我打球。
voice_over.pinyin: Xiàwǔ wǒ dào túshūguǎn qù shàngwǎng. Sì diǎn Wáng Péng lái zhǎo wǒ dǎqiú.

screen_overlay.main_text: 图书馆 (túshūguǎn) / 上网 (shàngwǎng) / 打球 (dǎ qiú)
screen_overlay.sub_text: library / to go online / to play ball

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 晚上，李友来到朋友白英爱的宿舍，看到她正戴着耳机，在书桌前聚精会神地做功课。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Li You enters a cozy and personalized dorm room. Her friend, Bai Ying'ai, is sitting at a desk piled with books, illuminated by a warm desk lamp, deeply focused on her homework. Li You smiles warmly at her friend. The camera is positioned from over Li You's shoulder, giving a point-of-view feel. 3D Pixar style, warm and cozy evening lighting creating a studious atmosphere.

voice_over.content: 七点半我去白英爱的宿舍跟她聊天儿。到那儿的时候, 她正在做功课。
voice_over.pinyin: Qī diǎn bàn wǒ qù Bái Yīng'ài de sùshè gēn tā liáotiānr. Dào nàr de shíhou, tā zhèngzài zuò gōngkè.

screen_overlay.main_text: 宿舍 (sùshè) / 聊天 (liáotiān) / 正在 (zhèngzài) / 做功课 (zuò gōngkè)
screen_overlay.sub_text: dormitory / to chat / in the middle of doing / to do homework

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 深夜，李友准备睡觉前，接到了高文中的电话。她看着手机，表情若有所思，因为电话内容是提醒她明天有考试。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Li You is in her pajamas, sitting on the edge of her bed, looking tired but thoughtful. She's holding her phone, which illuminates her face. A semi-transparent graphic of a calendar page for the next day with '考试!' (Exam!) written in red appears beside her. She nods with a knowing expression, ready for the challenge. 3D Pixar style, soft, warm bedroom lighting from a single bedside lamp.

voice_over.content: 睡觉以前, 高文中给我打了一个电话, 告诉我明天要考试。我说我已经知道了。
voice_over.pinyin: Shuìjiào yǐqián, Gāo Wénzhōng gěi wǒ dǎ le yí ge diànhuà, gàosu wǒ míngtiān yào kǎoshì. Wǒ shuō wǒ yǐjīng zhīdào le.

screen_overlay.main_text: 睡觉 (shuìjiào) / 打电话 (dǎ diànhuà) / 考试 (kǎoshì)
screen_overlay.sub_text: to sleep / to make a phone call / exam
